name: Lebanese Mashed Potatoes with Meat
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1. Chopped Onion
2. 1/2 lb Lamb Meat
3. 1/4 cup Pine Nuts
4. 1 small Can Mushrooms, chopped
5. 1 teaspoon Salt
6. 1 teaspoon Allspice
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1. Butter cut into small pieces
2. Bread crumbs
1. Mash the potatoes with butter, salt, and milk.
2. Prepare the filling by frying the meat with seasonings (salt and allspice).
3. Add onions to the meat mixture.
4. Stir in pine nuts and mushrooms, then fry everything well until cooked through.
5. Spread half of the potato mixture in a greased pan.
6. Layer the meat filling over the potatoes.
7. Cover with the remaining potato mixture.
8. Dot the top with butter pieces.
9. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly over the top.
10. Bake at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
11. Cut into squares to serve.
